name: io.github.gavintomlins/word-mcp-live-gavintomlins
title: Word MCP Live (gavintomlins)
description: Live Microsoft Word editing via MCP — tracked changes, undo, comments, validation, 125 tools. Security-hardened fork.

environmentVariables.name: WORD_MCP_AUTHOR
environmentVariables.description: Author name shown on tracked changes and comments (default: Author; legacy alias MCP_AUTHOR)

environmentVariables.name: WORD_MCP_AUTHOR_INITIALS
environmentVariables.description: Author initials shown on comments (legacy alias MCP_AUTHOR_INITIALS)
